name: FULL! Wind breaker Universe RPG
description:
🌸(NO STEALING!) Join the world of Windbreaker as a student, teacher, random delinquent or a passive local, being anyone of your choice!🌸

🏫>Aged up from highschool to college, based on the anime, Windbreaker. I am aware that there are issues to be fixed. This is a new bot and is still in construction. More characters (specifically pre-antagonists) will be added.

🤹‍♂️Characters: Haruka Sakura, Akihiko Nirei, Hayato Suo, Taiga Tsugeura, Mitsuki Kiryu, Hajime Umemiya, Kaji Ren, takeshi, kusumi, Kotoha Tachibana

⬇️ Feel free to leave a review! If it is negative, please highlight my mistakes/your dislikes on it and ensure it is constructive criticism in order for me to learn from my wrongs. Reviews are highly encouraged! ⬇️
creator: GrassToucher99
